zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor De Mowbray於大約1330年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾艾普沃斯時，她的父親John de Mowbray21歲，母親Joan of Lancaster19歲。她於1358年7月23日之前與Roger la Warre 3rd Baron De La Warr在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1387年享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor De Mowbray于大约1330年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾艾普沃斯时，她的父亲John de Mowbray21岁，母亲Joan of Lancaster19岁。她于1358年7月23日之前与Roger la Warre 3rd Baron De La Warr在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1387年享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mowbray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern; of Norman origin): habitational name from Montbray (Manche). Robert de Mowbray was Earl of Northumbria 1086–95, but was later imprisoned and deposed for rebelling against William II.

variants.name: Mulberry
meanings: English (Middlesex and Cambridgeshire): variant of   Mowbray  .
Irish (Derry): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Maoilbhearaigh ‘descendant of the devotee of (Saint) Bearach’.

variants.name: Mayberry
meanings: English: most probably an altered form of   Mowbray  . It is also found as   Maybury  , which has the form of an English habitational name. There is a place near Woking in Surrey so called; however, this is not recorded until 1885 and is probably derived from the surname. In England this surname is found mainly in the West Midlands; it has also spread into Wales. In Ireland this form is common in Ulster; MacLysaght records that it was taken there from England in the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor De Mowbray was born about 1330, in Epworth, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John de Mowbray, was 21 and her mother, Joan of Lancaster, was 19. She married Roger la Warre 3rd Baron De La Warr before 23 July 1358, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1387, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor De Mowbray est née environ 1330, à Epworth, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Mowbray, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Joan of Lancaster, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Roger la Warre 3rd Baron De La Warr avant 23 juillet 1358, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1387, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor De Mowbray um 1330 in Epworth, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Mowbray 21 und ihre Mutter Joan of Lancaster 19. Sie hat vor 23. Juli 1358 in England, United Kingdom Roger la Warre 3rd Baron De La Warr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1387 im Alter von 58 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor De Mowbray è nata il circa 1330 nel Epworth, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John de Mowbray, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Joan of Lancaster, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Roger la Warre 3rd Baron De La Warr prima del 23 luglio 1358, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1387, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor De Mowbrayが約1330年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアエプウオルスで生まれた時，父John de Mowbrayは21歳，母Joan of Lancasterは19歳であった。1358年7月23日以前にイギリスイギリスでRoger la Warre 3rd Baron De La Warrと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1387年に58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor De Mowbray(이)가 대략 1330년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 프워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Mowbray(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan of Lancaster(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1358년 7월 23일 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 Roger la Warre 3rd Baron De La Warr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1387년 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor De Mowbray nasceu aproximadamente 1330, em Epworth, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Mowbray, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Joan of Lancaster, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger la Warre 3rd Baron De La Warr antes 23 de julho de 1358, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1387, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor De Mowbray родилась около 1330 г. в местности эпворт, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John de Mowbray было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Joan of Lancaster, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger la Warre 3rd Baron De La Warr перед 23 июля 1358 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1387 г. в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor De Mowbray nació aproximadamente 1330, en Epworth, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John de Mowbray, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Joan of Lancaster, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Roger la Warre 3rd Baron De La Warr antes de 23 de julio de 1358, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1387, a la edad de 58 años.
